name: get_weather
description: Get current weather and a 3-day forecast for any city. Pass the city's latitude and longitude (you know these for major cities). Returns temperatures in Fahrenheit, precipitation chance, and conditions as weather codes (0=clear, 1-3=partly cloudy, 45-48=fog, 51-67=rain, 71-77=snow, 80-82=showers, 95-99=thunderstorm).
